default_source.doc_title: CME Group — FX Options Contract Specifications

contracts.note: Derived from CME's standard rule (expiry = 2 BDs prior to 3rd Wed of contract month on CME calendar; delivery = expiry + spot offset on RTGS{base, quote}). Verify against the official contract specs page before trading.
